expectations.text: Flink does NOT use a non-existent `<$flink>` sprite — instead uses `<$apache>` from gilbarbara WITH the word 'Flink' in the visible label (the documented Flink-gap workaround in references/20-sprites.md)
expectations.evidence: no <$flink> sprite (no sprites at all — plain-monochrome variant)

expectations.text: If sprites are used, `!include SPRITESURL/apache.puml` is present (the include line covers the apache sprite)
expectations.evidence: no sprites used so no apache include needed; 'Flink' in visible label

expectations.text: Pipeline lint passes (no W090 — `left to right direction` present; no W091 — semantic containers used; no W092 — every `<$name>` has a matching include)
